_comment: STANDALONE gateway (rpi4): single-board V-UCM roster — just this board (central:0). CMP_CONFIRMING waits only on its own ucm_activation marker from the LOCAL etcd. Superseded the L4-B multi-board roster (boards: compute, board_instances central:0,compute:1) — the Jetson is now its own standalone rig (jason), no longer a central-coordinated compute board.
